description_long: This is a modern rectangular table with a smooth, medium-brown wooden tabletop and a minimalist design. The tabletop is supported by two sturdy, black metal sled-style legs, each forming an inverted U-shape at either end of the table. The wood grain is visible on the surface, giving it a natural and warm appearance, while the metal legs provide a sleek, industrial contrast. The table has clean lines and no visible decorative elements, drawers, or additional features. Its proportions suggest it is suitable for use as a work desk, dining table, or communal table in urban environments such as offices, cafes, or public spaces. The overall construction appears robust and functional, with ample legroom beneath the tabletop.
description: A modern rectangular table with a brown wooden top and black metal sled legs, featuring a clean, minimalist design. The wood grain and sturdy metal frame give it a warm yet industrial look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the wooden tabletop and both black metal sled legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the tabletop and the depth of the metal leg frame.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the tabletop and both metal legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the tabletop's thickness and leg depth.
